'''shathama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassophile|thalassophile]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassophile|thalassophile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shathama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæthæmæth|shæthæmæth]] || [[word:shæthæmæj|shæthæmæj]] || [[word:shæthæmæsh|shæthæmæsh]] || [[word:shæthæmæ|shæthæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathathamath|shathathamath]] || [[word:shathathamaj|shathathamaj]] || [[word:shathathamash|shathathamash]] || [[word:shathathama|shathathama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathamath|shathamath]] || [[word:shathamaj|shathamaj]] || [[word:shathamash|shathamash]] || [[word:shathama|shathama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathafmath|shathafmath]] || [[word:shathafmaj|shathafmaj]] || [[word:shathafmash|shathafmash]] || [[word:shathafmaf|shathafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shathamatha|shathamatha]] || [[word:shathamaja|shathamaja]] || [[word:shathamasha|shathamasha]] || [[word:shathamaka|shathamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shathamath|shathamath]] || [[word:shathamaj|shathamaj]] || [[word:shathamash|shathamash]] || [[word:shathama|shathama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shathamathal|shathamathal]] || [[word:shathamajal|shathamajal]] || [[word:shathamashal|shathamashal]] || [[word:shathamakal|shathamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shathamathatha|shathamathatha]] || [[word:shathamajaja|shathamajaja]] || [[word:shathamashasha|shathamashasha]] || [[word:shathamaka|shathamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shathamathan|shathamathan]] || [[word:shathamajan|shathamajan]] || [[word:shathamashan|shathamashan]] || [[word:shathamakan|shathamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shathamathaoro|shathamathaoro]] || [[word:shathamajaoro|shathamajaoro]] || [[word:shathamashaoro|shathamashaoro]] || [[word:shathamakaoro|shathamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
